dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_origin} sent the {quest_threat} crashing through the {quest_focus}. Half our homes are ruined and the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_has} nowhere to go.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need someone to {quest_action} before it is too late. {quest_item} have been scattered {location_hint} and we desperately need them. The {enemy_type} have been drawn to the chaos.
dialogueChunks.outro: People are cold, scared, and hungry. Every bit you recover could save a life.

playerResponses.text: I will wade in and pull out whatever I can.
There is nothing left to save down there.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} sweeping toward the {quest_stakes} and nothing we have done has slowed it. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} overwhelmed and we are losing ground fast.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}. Gather {quest_item} from {location_hint} to help shore up our defenses. Watch for {enemy_type}: the disaster is driving them out and they are panicked.
dialogueChunks.outro: If this reaches the settlement, we lose everything. Every moment counts.

playerResponses.text: People come first. I will get it done.
Fighting disaster and beasts at the same time? Understood.

dialogueChunks.intro: Since {quest_origin}, {player_name}, the {quest_threat} keeps coming. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_is} failing, and the {quest_stakes} could be lost any day.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: We need to {quest_action} before the next wave finishes what the first one started. Bring {quest_item} from {location_hint}. The {enemy_type} have been scavenging the wreckage, so watch your back.
dialogueChunks.outro: Everything has turned against us. But we will not abandon our home without a fight.

playerResponses.text: Danger on all sides. What a day. I will help.
That area looks ready to collapse on whoever goes. Dangerous.
Maybe it is time to move somewhere safer.
